about: Write a short professional summary here. Mention your strongest skills, the type of work you are looking for, and the value you bring to a team or organization. Keep this paragraph concise so the CV remains one page.

experience.title: Current or Most Recent Role
bullets: Describe your main responsibility or achievement.
Mention a project, tool, or workflow you contributed to.
Show the impact of your work using clear, specific language.

experience.title: Previous Role
bullets: Describe your responsibilities in this role.
Add a second bullet showing communication, teamwork, or technical skills.
Add a third bullet with a measurable result if available.

experience.title: Project or Internship Role
bullets: Summarize the project or internship focus.
Explain what you created, organized, researched, or improved.
Mention tools, audiences, or collaborators where relevant.

experience.title: Additional Role
bullets: Describe a responsibility that supports the role you want next.
Highlight transferable skills such as organization, research, or service.
Keep each bullet short enough to fit on one page.

experience.title: Earlier Role
bullets: Describe relevant work from an earlier position.
Show how you adapted to different audiences or tasks.
Mention research, coordination, service, or leadership if relevant.
Add a short bullet about relevant coursework, research, or projects.
Add a second bullet showing skills or achievements from this program.
Add a bullet about relevant learning or practical experience.
Add a bullet about teamwork, communication, or field experience.
